description_long: This is a rustic, elongated loaf of bread with a golden-brown crust and a slightly irregular, hand-formed shape. The surface is dusted with a light layer of flour, giving it a slightly matte appearance. Distinctive diagonal scoring marks are visible along the top, allowing the bread to expand during baking and adding to its artisanal look. The crust appears crisp and firm, with some areas showing deeper browning and subtle blistering. The ends of the loaf are rounded, and the overall form is slightly tapered. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, golden-brown loaf of bread with diagonal scoring and a flour-dusted, crisp crust. The shape is elongated and slightly tapered at the ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated, slightly curved profile and the golden-brown crust with subtle flour dusting.
description_view_1: Angled end view highlighting the rounded tip and the prominent diagonal scoring on the top surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the loaf and the even distribution of flour and browning.
description_view_3: Angled end view from the opposite side, showing the other rounded tip and the scored top surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features diagonal scoring marks along the top, with a rustic, uneven texture and a light dusting of flour. The surface is golden-brown with some areas of deeper browning and subtle blistering.
